title: Odogaon Raghunath Temple
tagline: Odogaon Raghunath Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Odagaon Raghunath Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Rama in the town of Odagaon, Nayagarh district of Odisha in India.
overview.description: Odagaon Raghunath Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Rama in the town of Odagaon, Nayagarh district of Odisha in India. The temple dates back from the Middle Ages and is an important pilgrimage centre in Odisha. It is built in a typical Kalinga style of architecture and is topped by 3 golden kalashas. An important festival occurs here on Rama Navami.

topPlaces.name: Odagaon
topPlaces.description: Odagaon is a town and Notified area council in the Nayagarh district of the Indian state of Odisha. It is the location of the Lord Raghunath Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Odogaon Raghunath Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Odogaon Raghunath Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Odogaon Raghunath Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (91 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (92 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Odogaon Raghunath Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Odogaon Raghunath Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Odogaon Raghunath Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Odogaon Raghunath Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
